project.name: Diagnóstico Ley 1581 de 2012
project.description: Compliance assessment platform for Colombian data protection law (Ley 1581 de 2012). Diagnoses organizational compliance through a structured AI-assisted questionnaire, calculates a compliance percentage, generates automatic recommendations, and tracks an action plan.

backend.auth_provider: Supabase Auth (NOT OAuth2 — this overrides original PLAN.md OAuth2 design) + Supabase managed PostgreSQL (Path B)

infrastructure._note: PostgreSQL service REMOVED from docker-compose — Supabase provides managed PostgreSQL (Path B architecture)

auth_customizations._note: THIS OVERRIDES THE ORIGINAL PLAN.md OAuth2 DESIGN. No Google/Microsoft OAuth. Pure Supabase Auth.
auth_customizations.jwt_validation: FastAPI dependency validates Supabase JWT on backend
auth_customizations.jwt_storage: access + refresh tokens in frontend (stateless backend)

phase_1_scope.objective: Fully containerized, runnable skeleton (backend + frontend + DB + reverse proxy) with Supabase login working end-to-end.

deliverables.description: docker-compose.yml with services: postgres, backend, frontend, nginx
FastAPI app with lifespan, CORS, router stubs, config, database session
Alembic initialized with autogenerate targeting Base.metadata
React + Vite scaffold with Tailwind, shadcn/ui, routing, http client
Supabase Auth integration: register, login, JWT validation on backend, protected routes on frontend

acceptance_criteria: docker-compose up starts all four services; http://localhost renders LoginPage
Register + Login via Supabase returns a valid JWT pair stored in frontend
alembic upgrade head runs without error (empty schema)

open_items: HTTPS/TLS not configured (requires certificates - document for production)
Missing uv.lock and package-lock.json (needs UV/npm available to generate)
No rate limiting on API endpoints

scoring_logic.trigger: computed on assessment completion (status=completed), not during in-progress

tables.name: profiles
tables.columns: id (PK, UUID, FK→auth.users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT), display_name, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at
tables.notes: Path B: FK directly to Supabase auth.users — NO shadow table. Stores app-level profile data not in auth.users.

tables.name: companies
tables.columns: id (PK), name, nit (UQ), sector (ENUM), size (ENUM), contact_email, employee_count, created_at, updated_at
tables.notes: Multi-tenant root entity. sector_enum: publico/privado/mixto/ong/otro. size_enum: micro/pequena/mediana/grande.

tables.name: company_members
tables.columns: id (PK), company_id (FK→companies RESTRICT), profile_id (FK→profiles RESTRICT), role (ENUM: admin/auditor/reader), created_at. UNIQUE(company_id, profile_id)
tables.notes: Tenant-role join table. Composite UNIQUE prevents duplicate memberships.

tables.name: evaluations
tables.columns: id (PK), company_id (FK→companies RESTRICT), created_by (FK→profiles RESTRICT), status (ENUM: in_progress/completed), overall_score (NUMERIC(5,2)), finished_at (NULLABLE), created_at, updated_at
tables.notes: finished_at is NULL while in_progress; set only on completion. No DEFAULT now().

tables.name: answers
tables.columns: id (PK), evaluation_id (FK→evaluations RESTRICT), question_id (FK→questions RESTRICT), response (ENUM: yes/no/partial/na), notes (TEXT NULLABLE). UNIQUE(evaluation_id, question_id)
tables.notes: Composite UNIQUE for upsert. response is ENUM NOT BOOLEAN — NA excluded from denominator.

tables.name: sections
tables.columns: id (PK), name (VARCHAR), order (INT), is_optional (BOOLEAN DEFAULT false)
tables.notes: 10 fixed sections seeded per PLAN.md questionnaire design

tables.name: questions
tables.columns: id (PK), section_id (FK→sections RESTRICT), text (TEXT NOT NULL), order (INT), legal_reference (TEXT), ai_explanation_prompt (TEXT)
tables.notes: Seeded per questionnaire design. Awaiting resolution of PLAN-vs-frontend conflict.

tables.name: scores
tables.columns: id (PK), evaluation_id (FK→evaluations RESTRICT), section_id (FK→sections RESTRICT), score (NUMERIC(5,2)), max_score (NUMERIC(5,2)), percentage (NUMERIC(5,2))
tables.notes: NUMERIC(5,2) — NOT DOUBLE PRECISION. Recomputed on evaluation completion.

tables.name: recommendations
tables.columns: id (PK), evaluation_id (FK→evaluations RESTRICT), section_id (FK→sections RESTRICT), ai_generated_text (TEXT NOT NULL), priority (ENUM: high/medium/low)

tables.name: action_items
tables.columns: id (PK), recommendation_id (FK→recommendations RESTRICT), evaluation_id (FK→evaluations RESTRICT), status (ENUM: pending/in_progress/completed), assigned_to (FK→profiles RESTRICT), notes (TEXT), created_at, updated_at

tables.name: share_links
tables.columns: id (PK), evaluation_id (FK→evaluations RESTRICT), token (UUID UQ NOT NULL), expires_at (TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL), created_by (FK→profiles RESTRICT), created_at
tables.notes: Public share links for assessment results

indexes: FK indexes on ALL foreign key columns (per audit DM-10)
data_model.delete_strategy: ALL FKs use ON DELETE RESTRICT — preserve audit trails, return 409 on conflict (per audit DM-01)

security_requirements.cors: Restricted to configured domains (no wildcard in prod)
security_requirements.rate_limiting: slowapi middleware, strict on auth and AI routes
security_requirements.tenancy: Middleware resolves company_id from JWT; all queries scoped via TenantQuery helper; cross-tenant access returns 404 (not 403 to prevent enumeration)
security_requirements.input_validation: Pydantic Field constraints on all schemas (length, enums, regex for NIT/email)
security_requirements.sanitization: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML on user data; SSRF rejected on user-supplied URLs
security_requirements.secrets: All via .env / pydantic-settings; .env.example files provided; no secrets in repo
security_requirements.headers: Security headers in nginx.conf (HSTS, X-Content-Type, X-Frame, CSP)
security_requirements.owasp_target: No High findings on ZAP/Burp scan

cross_cutting_conventions.frontend_testing: vitest + React Testing Library for components/hooks; Playwright for smoke flows
cross_cutting_conventions.migrations: never edit committed Alembic revision; always new revision
cross_cutting_conventions.tenancy_rule: every SQL query goes through TenantQuery/scoped session
cross_cutting_conventions.env_rule: every new setting in config.py must appear in .env.example
cross_cutting_conventions.documentation: each phase ends with updated README + OpenAPI auto-diff

known_discrepancies.plan_documentation: OAuth2 via Google + Microsoft using authlib
known_discrepancies.impact: No OAuth flow needed; Supabase handles auth; backend validates Supabase JWT
Dependencies managed via uv instead of pip; may use pyproject.toml instead of requirements.txt

known_discrepancies.current_decision: Supabase managed PostgreSQL (project asgofjauortyigsoliii) — NO local Docker PostgreSQL
known_discrepancies.impact: Docker PostgreSQL service removed. profiles FK directly to auth.users(id). Connection strings point to Supabase PostgreSQL (direct for migrations, pooler for app).

known_discrepancies.current_decision: `profiles` table with FK directly to `auth.users(id)` — NO shadow table
known_discrepancies.impact: Simpler schema, no sync needed between auth.users and a shadow table. profiles stores only app-level extensions (display_name, avatar_url, preferences).

known_discrepancies.plan_documentation: PLAN.md specifies 10 sections, 43 questions, answer scale yes/no/partial/na
known_discrepancies.current_decision: Frontend code currently implements 3 blocks (politica, diseno, gobernanza), 11 questions, answer scale 0/35/70/100
known_discrepancies.impact: MUST be resolved before Phase 3 (Questionnaire). Affects: questions table schema, answer ENUM values, scoring logic, seed data, frontend questionnaire components. Flagged for user decision.
known_discrepancies._status: UNRESOLVED — user must decide before implementing
